characters.heading: Sino-Vietnamese Vocabulary
characters.normal:
| Word | Characters | Meaning | Usage |
|---|---|---|---|
| nhân viên văn phòng | 人員文房 | office worker | `Tôi là nhân viên văn phòng.` |

The characters show the word parts in this job phrase. Modern Vietnamese normally writes the phrase with the Vietnamese alphabet.
characters.expert:
| Word | Characters | Meaning | Usage |
|---|---|---|---|
| nhân viên văn phòng | 人員文房 | office worker | `Tôi là nhân viên văn phòng.` |

Expert context: **nhân viên** corresponds to 人員 and **văn phòng** to 文房. The latter has developed from a study or writing room to an office; the full row records morpheme correspondence, not a claim about current Chinese wording.

entries.usage: Tôi là nhân viên văn phòng.
